evals.name: NPM Dependency Audit
evals.description: Test audit of Node.js project with vulnerable dependencies
evals.prompt: pm-agent has completed entry classification and routed this confirmed `dependency-inventory` security scope to dependency-risk-auditor. Use the PM handoff packet in workspace `PM_HANDOFF.md` and the confirmed source document `docs/pm/dependency-inventory/PRD.md`. Audit the dependencies for security vulnerabilities.
evals.expected_output: Structured dependency risk audit that identifies vulnerable, outdated, or abandoned packages with severity, evidence, and upgrade or mitigation guidance.

assertions.description: 识别依赖生态、关键包和风险来源
assertions.text: 识别依赖生态、关键包和风险来源

assertions.description: 区分漏洞、废弃、过期或供应链风险并说明严重度
assertions.text: 区分漏洞、废弃、过期或供应链风险并说明严重度

assertions.description: 引用依赖文件、版本或已知风险作为证据
assertions.text: 引用依赖文件、版本或已知风险作为证据

assertions.description: 给出升级、替换或缓解建议
assertions.text: 给出升级、替换或缓解建议

evals.name: Mapped Client Dependency Documentation
evals.description: Verify that a dependency audit reads mapped formal documentation and validates an unverified client version claim against the dependency manifest
evals.prompt: 请审计 src/dependencies/manifest.json 中网络客户端依赖的风险，核对当前版本并给出升级或缓解建议。
evals.expected_output: 优先读取 change-map 命中的依赖文档，再以清单核对实际版本；将 unverified 文档按最低信任处理并报告文档版本与依赖清单不一致。

assertions.description: 命中 change-map 后优先读取网络客户端 required_docs
assertions.text: 从 src/dependencies/manifest.json 反查 change-map，优先读取 docs/site/api/network-client.md，只读取命中文档及必要上下文，不遍历无关正式文档。

assertions.description: 以依赖清单核对网络客户端版本
assertions.text: 关键依赖结论回到 src/dependencies/manifest.json；识别文档声称使用 2.1.0、清单实际固定 1.4.0 的不一致，并以清单事实评估风险。

assertions.description: 将 unverified 依赖文档按最低信任处理
assertions.text: 识别 required_docs 的 last_verified_version 为 unverified，对所有关键依赖判断扩大代码或清单核证，而不是直接采信文档或拒绝读取。

assertions.description: 改变正式文档事实的结论升级
assertions.text: 确认结论改变正式文档事实时，必须把结论与证据回交 `pm-agent` 分类并创建 issue，不直接交给 `docs-agent`、不由 Security 自行创建 issue；Security 自有的 `docs/security/` 过程报告除外，仍必须作为升级证据产出。
